subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur speaketh, addressing thee: Blessed art thou, for thou hast recognized God, thy Lord, and detached thyself from all else but Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یتکلم لسان العظمه مخاطبا ایاک طوبی لک بما عرفت الله ربک و انقطعت عما سواه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
